We rule the whole forest!: That's why we dance in rings of mushrooms.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 「這就是為什麼我們在蘑菇圈裡跳舞。」

We rule the whole forest!: You better not come into our ring!
We never let humans into our ring.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 「我們從不讓人類進來我們的圓圈。」

We rule the whole forest!: It takes forever to get the smell out!
It spoils the magic when a human comes in.
It makes us very, very angry!
The fairies can avoid your grasp easily.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 妖精能輕易躲開你的掌握。

We rule the whole forest!: Perhaps you should be better prepared to get some fairy dust next time.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 也許下次你應該準備得更好才能取得妖精塵。

We rule the whole forest!: Don't be greedy.  We already gave you some.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 「別貪心。我們已經給你一些了。」

We rule the whole forest!: Where could you possibly get that?
Maybe you should ask the Fairies for some.  That would be the polite thing to do.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 也許你應該問妖精要一些。那是禮貌的做法。

We rule the whole forest!: The fairies look like little dancing lights, but you get a strong sense that they are female with butterfly wings.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 妖精看起來像小小的舞動光芒，但你強烈感覺她們是有蝴蝶翅膀的女性。

We rule the whole forest!: The ring of mushrooms contains mushrooms slightly larger than the ones you are used to.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 蘑菇圈裡有比你慣見的蘑菇稍大的蘑菇。

We rule the whole forest!: The fairy ring is luminous at night.
You hold out your hand...what else could you do?
You realize that you need something such as an empty flask to put this fairy dust into.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你體會到你需要像空瓶子這樣的容器來裝這些妖精塵。

We rule the whole forest!: As the fairy dust sifts through your fingers, you realize that you need something to put it in.  You're fresh out of empty containers.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 當妖精塵從你的手指間灑落時，你意識到你需要什麼東西來裝。你已經沒有空容器了。

We rule the whole forest!: Wow!  That was pretty wild!  It's probably not a good idea to eat too many more of these mushrooms, though.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 哇!那相當狂野!不過吃更多這些蘑菇可能不是個好主意。

We rule the whole forest!: They seem to be ignoring you.
There is much magic surrounding the fairies and their ring of mushrooms.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 環繞著妖精和她們的蘑菇圈有很多魔法。

We rule the whole forest!: It's either a stone, a pebble, a mass of stony material, a solid mineral deposit, a block, or a rock.  Take your pick.  (Just don't take a pick to the rock.)
「我們統治整個森林!」: 它要麼是一塊石頭、鵝卵石、大量石質物質、固體礦床、石塊，要麼是石頭。你挑吧。(只別真的用鎬子鑿石頭。)

We rule the whole forest!: The rock sits there in stony silence.
The arrogance of the Baronet astonishes you.  Perchance the kobold Magic User had a reason for changing him into a bear.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 貴族少爺的傲慢令你驚訝。也許那個地精法師有理由把他變成熊。

We rule the whole forest!: You have the honor of meeting the Baronet Barnard von Spielburg.  We are pleased that you broke our enchantment.  Perhaps our father the Baron will reward you should you ever visit our castle.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 「你有幸遇見巴納德·馮·史畢柏格貴族少爺。我們很高興你打破了我們的魔法。也許我們的父親男爵會在你訪問我們的城堡時獎勵你。」

We rule the whole forest!: You have a funny feeling that you may have made a slight tactical error.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你覺得事情不對勁，好像犯了個小戰術錯誤。

We rule the whole forest!: The body lying there looks a lot like the picture of the Baronet von Spielburg on the poster at the guild hall.  You have a funny feeling that you may have made a slight tactical error.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 躺在那裡的屍體看起來很像公會大廳海報上貴族少爺馮·史畢柏格的圖片。你覺得事情不對勁，好像犯了個小戰術錯誤。

We rule the whole forest!: The cavern contains some impressive formations and is rather beautiful, as caves go.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 洞穴裡有一些令人印象深刻的地形，就洞穴來說相當美麗。

We rule the whole forest!: Would you like to choose a different character type?
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你想選擇不同的角色類型嗎?

We rule the whole forest!: You still have points to allocate.
To drop an item in the game, first click here, then click on the item.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 要在遊戲中丟棄物品，先點擊這裡，然後點擊物品。

We rule the whole forest!: This icon tells you about other icons.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 這個圖示說明其他圖示的功能。
你有 %d 個%s。每個重 %d.%d 磅。

We rule the whole forest!: You can't use your %s on your %s.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你無法用你的%s作用在你的%s上。

We rule the whole forest!: You don't really want to drop your last weapon.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你其實不想丟掉你最後的武器。

We rule the whole forest!: You don't really want to drop your %s.
It would not be a good idea to drop anything here.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 在這裡丟棄任何東西都不是個好主意。

We rule the whole forest!: You have %d gold piece%s and %d silver piece%s, weighing %d.%d pounds.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你有 %d 個金幣和 %d 個銀幣，重 %d.%d 磅。

We rule the whole forest!: You have %d silver piece%s, weighing %d.%d pounds.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你有 %d 個銀幣，重 %d.%d 磅。

We rule the whole forest!: You have %d gold piece%s, weighing %d.%d pounds.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你有 %d 個金幣，重 %d.%d 磅。

We rule the whole forest!: A moth flies from your money pouch.  That is all.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 一隻蛾從你的錢袋飛出。就這樣。

We rule the whole forest!: No silver threads or golden needles...  your pouch is empty.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 沒有銀線或金針…你的袋子是空的。

We rule the whole forest!: You drop the rest of your silvers, all but one that you keep for luck.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你丟掉了剩下的銀幣，只留下一個以求好運。

We rule the whole forest!: You start to drop your gold, but think better of it.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你想丟金幣，但後來改主意了。

We rule the whole forest!: You pick up the rest of your silvers.
There is nothing to pick up.
You pick up one of your %ss.
To look more closely at an object, first click here, then click on the item.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 要仔細查看物品，先點擊這裡，然後點擊物品。

We rule the whole forest!: Click here to close this window and return to the game.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 點擊這裡關閉視窗並回到遊戲。

We rule the whole forest!: Click here to see the rest of your stuff.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 點擊這裡查看其他物品。

We rule the whole forest!: To pick up an item that you have dropped recently, first click here, then click on the item.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 要撿起你最近丟掉的物品，先點擊這裡，然後點擊物品。

We rule the whole forest!: To select an item to use in the game, first click here, then click on the item.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 要在遊戲中選擇物品使用，先點擊這裡，然後點擊物品。

We rule the whole forest!: You are now carrying %d pounds of equipment, supplies, and whatever else you've picked up along the way.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你現在攜帶著 %d 磅的裝備、補給品和沿途撿起的其他東西。

We rule the whole forest!: You can carry up to %d pound%s of equipment without getting a severe backache.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你可以攜帶最多 %d 磅的裝備而不會嚴重背痛。

We rule the whole forest!: Select this icon to find out how much weight you're carrying.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 選擇這個圖示來了解你攜帶的重量。

We rule the whole forest!: As the sun begins to rise, the Troll runs off to some dark hole.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 當太陽開始升起時，巨魔跑進某個黑暗的洞。

We rule the whole forest!: You could not escape.  The battle is on.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你無法逃脫。戰鬥開始了。

We rule the whole forest!: A monster just wandered by.  You hid in the bushes until it passed.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 一隻怪物剛好走過。你躲在灌木叢裡直到它經過。

We rule the whole forest!: Although that spell is not useful here, you at least had a chance to practice it.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 雖然那個咒語在這裡沒有用，但你至少有機會練習它。

We rule the whole forest!: You don't see anything closed around here.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你沒看到周圍有任何關閉的東西。
你感覺不到這裡有魔法。

We rule the whole forest!: Certainly you don't want to Fetch THAT!
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你當然不想用取物術取那個!

We rule the whole forest!: Good practice, but there's nothing worth Fetching here.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 很好的練習，但這裡沒有值得取的東西。

We rule the whole forest!: The monster doesn't seem very calm.  Maybe it didn't like you hurting it.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 那隻怪物似乎不太冷靜。也許它不喜歡你傷害它。

We rule the whole forest!: You remove as much of the Troll's beard as you can and put it away in your pack.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 你盡可能地去除巨魔的鬍子並放入你的背包。

We rule the whole forest!: Some of the Cheetaur's claws have been broken off or damaged, apparently in battle.  You remove the remaining claws and put them away in your pack.
「我們統治整個森林!」: 一些獵豹人的爪已經被折斷或損壞，顯然是在戰鬥中。你移除剩下的爪子並放入你的背包。
